## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] `./install.sh` runs without errors
- [ ] `./uninstall.sh` removes all files and config entries
- [ ] `shellcheck install.sh uninstall.sh` passes (if available)
- [ ] Tested on: [OS name and version]

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing steps changed
